subject: [PATCH v3 15/19] mm/hugetlb_vmemmap: Move bootmem HVO setup to early init

reviews.author: Muchun Song
reviews.summary: Reviewer Muchun Song noted that the new path in the patch panics on any non-zero return from vmemmap_populate_hvo(), which is intended as per patch 6, and already handles OOM by panicking
reviews.raw_body:
This is intentional; see patch 6:

   mm/sparse: Panic on memmap and usemap allocation failure

We already panic on OOM anyway.

Muchun,
Thanks.

2026-06-03.patch_summary: This patch moves the setup of Hugepage Vmemmap (HVO) to early initialization, replacing the previous fallback mechanism that lost HVO optimization on error. The new path panics if vmemmap_populate_hvo() returns an error, which may be a stricter requirement than intended for HVO as an optimization rather than a hard necessity.
